title: South Korea in post-study visa push amid shift towards quality
summary_en: After surpassing its “Study Korea 300K” target ahead of schedule, South Korea says it now wants to shift focus towards “strategic quality management”, post-graduation opportunities and long-term talent retention.
author: Abhishek Nair
title_cn: 韩国在教育提质转型背景下推进毕业生留韩签证政策

title: Jacqui Smith: UK universities must prove local value
summary_en: The UK minister for skills, Baroness Jacqui Smith, has reiterated the government’s support for international education, while urging universities to do more to combat public scepticism of higher education.
author: Polly Nash
title_cn: 雅基·史密斯：英国高校必须证明其本土价值
summary_cn: 近日，英国高等教育领域相关人士雅基·史密斯就英国高校办学管理工作提出明确要求，指出英国境内各高等院校须依规证明自身对本土发展的实际价值。

title: The PIEoneer Awards 2026 shortlist revealed
summary_en: The shortlist for The PIEoneer Awards 2026 has been revealed, marking a major milestone as the international education sector’s flagship event celebrates its 10th anniversary this year.
author: The PIE News team
title_cn: 2026年度PIEoneer国际教育先锋奖入围名单正式公布
summary_cn: 近期，2026年度PIEoneer国际教育先锋奖组委会正式对外公布本年度奖项入围短名单。PIEoneer国际教育先锋奖是全球国际教育领域极具公信力的专业性评选活动，旨在表彰全球范围内在国际教育交流合作领域取得突出成效、作出积极贡献的各类主体及从业人员。

title: US: Duration of status elimination moves to final review
summary_en: Replacing 'duration of status' with fixed time limits on student and visitor visas has moved one step closer to becoming a reality in the US, as the final rule is submitted for White House approval.
author: Polly Nash
title_cn: 美国：身份取消审理时长相关事项进入最终审核阶段

title: Who’s in the room? Inside the new Education Sector Action Group
summary_en: Advisory and core members now make up the government’s new Education Sector Action Group (ESAG), the minister-led body tasked with driving the UK’s international education strategy.
author: Kim Martin
title_cn: 教育领域新成立行动小组人员构成及相关情况介绍

title: Wales’ Taith program expands access to international learning
summary_en: Wales' international learning exchange program is widening access to global mobility opportunities by opening up access to those who have not traditionally been internationally mobile.
author: Beth Kennedy
title_cn: 威尔士“泰思”项目拓宽国际学习参与渠道

title: “Small violin” for UK university funding woes as sector urged to rebuild trust
summary_en: A new report from the UCL Policy Lab argues that UK universities must take the lead in rebuilding public trust and renewing their civic purpose if they are to thrive in the years ahead.
author: Kim Martin
title_cn: 英国高校办学经费困境未获公众共情 高等教育界被敦促重建信任

title: Universities unite behind Nepal’s “10k int’l student” ambition
summary_en: In a first-of-its-kind private sector initiative, Nepalese universities are coming together to attract international students, amid ambitions to increase enrolment more than sixfold within three years and position the country as an "emerging South Asian education destination".
author: Abhishek Nair
title_cn: 多所高校协同支持尼泊尔实现“招收万名国际学生”愿景

title: Rankings displays do not build social licence, say HE leaders
summary_en: Universities risk a “grave error” if they rely solely on economic and research impact or rankings results to justify their value, sector leaders have warned.
author: Amy Baker
title_cn: 高等教育界负责人表示 发布排名无法构建社会许可

title: Finland looks to tighten rules on international students’ finances
summary_en: Finland’s government has suggested new legislation that could see international students lose their residence permits if they access social assistance, as part of a wider crackdown on income-related challenges.
author: Beth Kennedy
title_cn: 芬兰拟收紧国际学生资金审核相关规定
summary_cn: 近期，芬兰教育与移民主管部门拟出台管理新规，收紧赴芬就读国际学生的资金审核相关要求，进一步规范国际学生留学资质核查工作流程。

title: New Zealand-India free trade agreement puts mobility in play
summary_en: New Zealand has signed an annex on student mobility and post-study work rights with India, alongside a new skilled employment pathway – with stakeholders citing strong demand while seeking greater clarity and a shift in perception on Indian applicants.
author: Abhishek Nair
title_cn: 新西兰与印度自由贸易协定将人员流动事项纳入谈判范畴
